name: Shuffle
description: Pairs of rounded blocks sliding between the four corners of their frame — every redraw deals a new arrangement, like tiles in a pocket puzzle.

code.style: --q1x: @p(2%, 52%); --q1y: @p(2%, 52%); --q2x: @p(2%, 52%); --q2y: @p(2%, 52%); --blk1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --blk2: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 46%; left: var(--q1x); top: var(--q1y); border-radius: 14%; background: var(--blk1); transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 46%; left: var(--q2x); top: var(--q2y); border-radius: 14%; background: var(--blk2); opacity: 0.92; transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
